title: 5.5 watts 40 watts LED Candle Light Bulb SES E14 Small Screw in Daylight Packs of 2/4/10 (Pack of 2)
features: Quality brand Status LED Candle Light Bulbs
SES E14 Small Screw In Cap. Length 97mm Diameter 37mm. Not dimmable.
Daylight colour tone 6500K. This is ideal when you need your light to as close to natural daylight as possible. So ideal for hobby areas, crafts, study, sewing etc
Equivalent to 40 watts, but only uses 5.5 watts.470 Lumens. Average lifespan 25,000hrs/12500 on&off cycles.
